3.name: SA1309_FieldNamesShouldNotBeginWithUnderscore
3.Note: Project uses leading underscore private-field convention; rule is stylistic and considered a false positive in this codebase.

4.name: SA1200_UsingDirectivesPlacement
4.Note: WinForms file mixes designer and handwritten code; strict ordering rules from analyzers are noisy here.

5.name: SA1101_ThisPrefixNotRequired
5.Note: Rule that enforces explicit 'this.' prefix is a stylistic choice; analyzer flag is not helpful for this codebase.

6.name: SA1516_MissingBlankLineBetweenElements
6.Note: Additional blank-line recommendations are minor and can be treated as false positives for this small project.
